steps.name: Exterior walkaround inspection
steps.instructions: Document visible defects, prior damage, and customer concerns with photos.

steps.name: Establish mobile work zone
steps.instructions: Position vehicle, hoses, and tools; confirm drainage and customer access.

steps.name: Belongings inventory and removal
steps.instructions: Remove and bag loose items; note valuables left in vehicle.

steps.name: Confirm service scope with customer
steps.instructions: Review tier deliverables, add-ons, and areas of focus before starting work.

steps.name: Extended defect survey
steps.instructions: Macro-document paint defects, stains, and trim fade for showroom delivery record.

steps.name: Pre-rinse wheel assemblies
steps.instructions: Flush loose debris from wheels, tires, and wells before contact cleaning.
parallel_hints: Stage engine bay covers if engine service is sold

steps.name: Wheel well and barrel flush
steps.instructions: Agitate and rinse inner barrels and wheel wells; contain runoff for main wash.

steps.name: Decontaminate wheels and tires
steps.instructions: Clean faces, barrels, and tires with dedicated brushes; no wash mitt on wheels.

steps.name: Lug nut and hardware detail
steps.instructions: Clean around lug nuts and center caps; dry before moving vehicle.

steps.name: Protect sensitive engine components
steps.instructions: Cover alternator, intake, ECU connectors, and exposed filters before degreasing.

steps.name: Apply controlled engine degreaser
steps.instructions: Brush agitate; avoid high pressure on electrical connectors.
parallel_hints: Remove floor mats; pre-rinse wheels if sequencing allows

steps.name: Agitate engine bay surfaces
steps.instructions: Detail brushes on hoses, plastics, and firewall; keep degreaser wet.

steps.name: Low-pressure engine bay rinse
steps.instructions: Rinse thoroughly; contain runoff for the contact wash phase.

steps.name: Engine bay dressing and wipe-down
steps.instructions: Apply water-based dressing to plastics; wipe excess; leave hoses matte.

steps.name: Remove mats and stage interior access
steps.instructions: Remove all floor mats and liners; shake debris away from vehicle.

steps.name: Foam pre-wash application
steps.instructions: Apply pH-neutral foam; do not allow to dry on paint or trim.
parallel_hints: Compressed-air purge interior seams on refresh tiers

steps.name: Two-bucket contact wash
steps.instructions: Wash top-down with grit guards; rinse mitt frequently.

steps.name: Door jamb and shut-face cleaning
steps.instructions: Clean jambs, hinges, and door edges; dry to prevent streaking.

steps.name: Final exterior rinse
steps.instructions: Rinse all panels, jambs, and lower rockers; verify no soap residue.

steps.name: Iron fallout removal
steps.instructions: Apply iron remover per label; rinse thoroughly before clay or sealant.

steps.name: Clay bar decontamination
steps.instructions: Clay with adequate lubrication; discard clay if dropped.

steps.name: Decon residue wipe-down
steps.instructions: IPA or dedicated wipe to remove lubricant and fallout residue before protection.

steps.name: Tar and adhesive spot treatment
steps.instructions: Spot-treat bonded contaminants on paint and trim; avoid painted plastic trim.

steps.name: Forced-air drying
steps.instructions: Blow water from mirrors, grilles, and emblems; avoid contact on dry paint.

steps.name: Microfiber panel dry
steps.instructions: Dry paint with plush towels; separate lower panels if heavily soiled.

steps.name: Door jamb dry and inspection
steps.instructions: Dry jambs and shut faces; check for remaining water before interior work.

steps.name: Compressed-air seam purge
steps.instructions: Blow debris from seat rails, vents, and seams before vacuuming.

steps.name: Interior vacuum
steps.instructions: Vacuum carpets, seats, and footwells with crevice tool.

steps.name: Trunk and cargo vacuum
steps.instructions: Vacuum trunk or cargo area; remove spare-well debris on maintenance tier.

steps.name: Trunk deep clean
steps.instructions: Clean carpet, side panels, and latch area; verify spare and tools stowed.

steps.name: Headliner dust removal
steps.instructions: Soft brush and vacuum only; do not saturate headliner fabric.

steps.name: Pet hair removal (light)
steps.instructions: Rubber brush and repeated vacuum passes on affected areas.

steps.name: Pet hair removal (severe)
steps.instructions: Rubber tool, air purge, and detail vacuum on all affected upholstery.

steps.name: Low-moisture carpet extraction
steps.instructions: Extract carpets and cloth seats; monitor moisture before reassembly.

steps.name: Extended extraction pass
steps.instructions: Second pass on heavy soiling; extend dwell time per product label.

steps.name: Interior moisture verification
steps.instructions: Confirm carpets and seats are dry to touch before mats and trim reassembly.

steps.name: Light odor source treatment
steps.instructions: Clean identified sources; ventilate cabin before protectants.

steps.name: Moderate odor enzyme treatment
steps.instructions: Apply enzyme or neutralizer per label; allow dwell before extraction if needed.

steps.name: Ozone treatment preparation
steps.instructions: Seal vents as required; remove occupants, pets, and plants from area.

steps.name: Ozone generator treatment
steps.instructions: Run generator per policy; ventilate thoroughly before customer handoff.

steps.name: Leather clean and conditioning
steps.instructions: pH-appropriate cleaner and conditioner; avoid coated suede and alcantara.

steps.name: Cockpit and door panel cleaning
steps.instructions: Wipe dash, console, and doors with static-safe products; protect screens.

steps.name: Vent and crevice brush detail
steps.instructions: Brush vents, switches, and seams; wipe residue with microfiber.

steps.name: Advanced stain remediation
steps.instructions: Spot-treat stubborn stains with appropriate chemistry; test in hidden area first.

steps.name: Seat track and rail detail
steps.instructions: Vacuum and wipe seat rails; lubricate if customer-approved.

steps.name: Interior UV protectant application
steps.instructions: Matte finish on plastics; avoid pedals, steering wheel contact patch, and glass.

steps.name: Windshield decontamination polish
steps.instructions: Clay or polish windshield exterior for wiper clarity; mask sensitive trim.

steps.name: Interior and exterior glass refinement
steps.instructions: Clean all glass after interior protectants; buff streak-free.

steps.name: Paint protection application
steps.instructions: Apply spray sealant or premium LSP per tier; level haze before curing.

steps.name: Exterior trim restoration
steps.instructions: Restore faded exterior trim; wipe residue from paint and glass.

steps.name: Exhaust tip polish
steps.instructions: Clean and polish tips; protect surrounding bumper from metal polish.

steps.name: Water-based tire dressing
steps.instructions: Dress tires near delivery; avoid sling on paint and driveways.

steps.name: Reinstall floor mats and liners
steps.instructions: Confirm mats are dry; align retention hooks; vacuum loose debris first.

steps.name: Restore customer belongings
steps.instructions: Return inventoried items; verify nothing left in bays or trunk.

steps.name: Cabin scent and HVAC check
steps.instructions: Verify neutral or light scent; run fan briefly to clear product odor.

steps.name: Work-complete quality inspection
steps.instructions: Inspect all surfaces under adequate light before final photos.

steps.name: Delivery quality inspection
steps.instructions: Customer-facing check: mats, settings, scent, and belongings.

steps.name: Customer delivery walkthrough
steps.instructions: Review completed work with customer; note any concerns for follow-up.

steps.name: Ceramic coating application
steps.instructions: Reserved for future use.

steps.name: Paint correction — compound stage
steps.instructions: Reserved for future use.

steps.name: Paint correction — polish stage
steps.instructions: Reserved for future use.
